phoneticUs: da瑟藢ha瑟dro蕣tes藞t蓱藧st蓹藢ro蕣n
examples: This enzyme catalyzes one step in the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone, which is a hormone implicated in hair loss.
Dihydrotestosterone (often shortened to DHT) is primarily responsible for miniaturization of the hair follicles in those who suffer from genetic baldness.
Objective to observe the clinical therapeutic effect of Yifa compound treating female pattern hair loss and its effect on sera dihydrotestosterone (DHT) and dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) levels.
